title: thevetia longifolia
intro: Thevetia longifolia, also known as the yellow oleander, is a poisonous plant native to tropical regions of Asia, Africa, and Australia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Thevetia longifolia include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Thevetia longifolia include extracts and tinctures, which are often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
